scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && cp dist/index.js dist/ctx.js
scripts.test:e2e:flake:ci: bun run ci:prepare-results && bun run test/integration/flaky-e2e.ts --cycles 3 --max-reruns 1 --json --report test-results/e2e-flake-report.json --history test-results/e2e-flake-history.json --recurring-threshold 2
scripts.test:soak:e2e:ci: bun run ci:prepare-results && bun run test/integration/soak-e2e.ts --runs 10 --file-count 200 --json --assert-success --assert-deterministic > test-results/e2e-soak-report.json
scripts.test:unit:ci: bun run ci:prepare-results && bun test $(rg --files test --glob '**/*.test.ts' --glob '!integration/**' --glob '!**/*.integration.test.ts' --glob '!**/cli-e2e.test.ts' --glob '!**/golden-snapshots.test.ts') --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir coverage/unit --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile test-results/unit.junit.xml && bun run test/performance/coverage-gate.ts --lane unit --lcov coverage/unit/lcov.info --config test/performance/coverage-thresholds.json
scripts.test:integration:ci: bun run ci:prepare-results && bun test $(rg --files test --glob '**/*.integration.test.ts') --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir coverage/integration --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile test-results/integration.junit.xml && bun run test/performance/coverage-gate.ts --lane integration --lcov coverage/integration/lcov.info --config test/performance/coverage-thresholds.json
scripts.test:e2e:ci:raw: bun run ci:prepare-results && CTX_E2E_ARTIFACT_ROOT=test-results/e2e-diagnostics bun test test/integration/cli-e2e.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir coverage/e2e --reporter=junit --reporter-outfile test-results/e2e.junit.xml && bun run test/performance/coverage-gate.ts --lane e2e --lcov coverage/e2e/lcov.info --config test/performance/coverage-thresholds.json
scripts.test:e2e:flake-gate: bun run test/performance/e2e-flake-gate.ts --command 'bun run test:e2e:ci:raw' --max-reruns 1 --report test-results/e2e-flake-gate-report.json --history test-results/e2e-flake-gate-history.json --flake-threshold 3 --window-days 14 --parent-bead ctx-1az.3.4
scripts.test:soak:ci: bun run ci:prepare-results && CTX_BENCHMARK_ENFORCE=1 bun run test/performance/pipeline-benchmark.ts --json > test-results/soak-benchmark.json
